titleStmt.title: SII 9.586: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 586. (A.R. No. 2 of 1904.) ON THE RIGHT SIDE OF THE EASTERN GOPURA OF THE VITTHALASVĀMI TEMPLE AT HAMPI, HOSPET TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka, 1459, Viḷambi, Adhika-Jyēshṭha, śu. 15, Sōmavāra corresponding to A.D. 1538 May 13, Monday. It records that, in the reign of Achyutadēva-Mahārāya, Hiriya Timmappa-Nāyaka, son of Udhiya Timappa-Nāyaka, gave a sum of gold coins for putting up pinnacles on the eastern gōpura of the Viṭṭhaladēva temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayādbhudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1459
viḷaṁbisaṁvacharada Adhikajēṣṭa śu 15 sōmavāradalu śrīmaṁ
mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīacyutadēva
mahārāyaru pruthvīrājyaṁgaiuttaṁ yiralu cātrada śrīvaiṣṇava tirupa
śrīviṭhaladēvara mūḍaṇa gōpurada suvarnada kaḷasada
ke hēḷalāgi Udhiya tiṁmappanāyakara maganu rāyara caparada hiriya
timmappanāyakaruṁ taṁma caparada raghavapanu taṁma voḍeya Acyutarāyamahā
rāyarigu cikkarāyarigu pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgabēku yeṁdu ko vāsivarada paṇau
ge pārupatyada śamaṁda ciṁnada ha kaḷasa purada ciṁna
ke harivāṇa 1 khajāya
baru tapidare
Digital edition of SII 9.586 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
